bead.title: test: add TD-031 transition matrix to backend_conformance_test.go
bead.description:
PROBLEM
cli/internal/bead/backend_conformance_test.go currently tests create/update/claim/deps/events but does not exercise the full bead lifecycle state transition matrix defined in the spec.

ROOT CAUSE
The spec (TD-031, to be created in B1) defines all legal transitions, but backend_conformance_test.go only verifies basic CRUD operations. The TestBackendConformance_TransitionMatrix test exists (line 173) but is incomplete or minimal.

PROPOSED FIX
Extend backend_conformance_test.go to:
1. Document which transitions are legal (per TD-031 once available).
2. Add sub-tests for every legal transition with both jsonl and axon backends:
   - open -> in_progress -> open (claim/unclaim)
   - open -> in_progress -> closed (claim then close)
   - open -> blocked (with external reason)
   - blocked -> open (unblock)
   - open -> proposed (operator required)
   - proposed -> open (operator accepted)
   - proposed -> cancelled
   - closed -> open (manual reopen)
3. Add sub-tests for every illegal transition with both backends, verifying ValidateLifecycleTransition rejects them.
4. Verify both backends produce identical results (conformance).

NON-SCOPE
Do not add stress tests or property-based tests. Do not test agent-level policies (only Store.TransitionLifecycle).
bead.acceptance:
1. backend_conformance_test.go::TestBackendConformance_TransitionMatrix exercises all legal transitions from TD-031.
2. backend_conformance_test.go has sub-tests for 12+ legal transitions (open->in_progress->open, open->in_progress->closed, etc.).
3. backend_conformance_test.go has sub-tests for 6+ illegal transitions with assertion that ValidateLifecycleTransition rejects.
4. All sub-tests run against both jsonl and axon backends (forEachBackendConformanceCase).
5. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/backend_conformance_test.go::TestBackendConformance_TransitionMatrix passes; both backends match.
